---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
# --- PARAMETERS ---
n <- 25          # total nodes
m <- 4            # number of modules
p_in <- 0.35       # within-module connection probability
p_out <- 0.008     # between-module connection probability

# --- LIBRARIES ---
library(igraph)

# --- ASSIGN NODES TO MODULES ---
module_sizes <- rep(floor(n/m), m)
remainder <- n - sum(module_sizes)
if (remainder > 0) module_sizes[1:remainder] <- module_sizes[1:remainder] + 1

membership <- rep(1:m, times = module_sizes)

# --- CREATE ADJACENCY MATRIX ---
adj <- matrix(0, n, n)
for (i in 1:n) {
  for (j in 1:n) {
    if (i != j) {
      if (membership[i] == membership[j]) {
        adj[i, j] <- rbinom(1, 1, p_in)
      } else {
        adj[i, j] <- rbinom(1, 1, p_out)
      }
    }
  }
}

# --- MAKE GRAPH ---
g <- graph_from_adjacency_matrix(adj, mode = "undirected", diag = FALSE)

# --- VISUALIZE ---
plot(
  g,
  vertex.color = membership,
  vertex.size = 6,
  vertex.label = NA,
  layout = layout_with_fr(g),
  main = paste("Synthetic Modular Network (n =", n, ", m =", m, ")")
)

```

```{r}
set.seed(42)
visit_count <- numeric(n)
current <- sample(1:n, 1)  # start at random node
s <- 1000       # number of steps in random walk
teleport_prob <- 0.05  # probability of teleporting to a random node

for (step in 1:s) {
  visit_count[current] <- visit_count[current] + 1
  
  # Teleportation step
  if (runif(1) < teleport_prob) {
    current <- sample(1:n, 1)
    next
  }
  
  # Regular step: move to random neighbor (if any)
  neighbors <- neighbors(g, current)
  if (length(neighbors) == 0) {
    current <- sample(1:n, 1)  # teleport if isolated
  } else {
    current <- sample(neighbors, 1)
  }
}

# --- COMPUTE VISIT FREQUENCIES ---
visit_freq <- visit_count / sum(visit_count)
node_probs <- data.frame(
  node_id = 1:n,
  module = membership,
  freq = visit_freq,
  perc_time = 100 * visit_freq
)

# --- DISPLAY ---
head(node_probs[order(-node_probs$freq), ], 10)
cat("\nCoverage: visited", sum(visit_count > 0), "of", n, "nodes (",
    round(100 * sum(visit_count > 0) / n, 1), "%)\n")
```

```{r}
# -------------------------------
# PURE R HUFFMAN CODING FUNCTION
# -------------------------------
huffman_code <- function(symbols, probs) {
  # Create initial forest of leaf nodes
  forest <- lapply(seq_along(symbols), function(i) {
    list(symbol = symbols[i], prob = probs[i], left = NULL, right = NULL)
  })
  
  # Combine nodes until only one tree remains
  while (length(forest) > 1) {
    # Sort by probability
    forest <- forest[order(sapply(forest, function(x) x$prob))]
    
    # Take two smallest
    left <- forest[[1]]
    right <- forest[[2]]
    
    # Merge them
    new_node <- list(
      symbol = NULL,
      prob = left$prob + right$prob,
      left = left,
      right = right
    )
    
    # Replace forest
    forest <- c(list(new_node), forest[-c(1,2)])
  }
  
  # Recursively extract codes
  codes <- list()
  
  extract_codes <- function(node, prefix = "") {
    if (!is.null(node$symbol)) {
      # Leaf node
      codes[[as.character(node$symbol)]] <<- prefix
      return()
    }
    extract_codes(node$left, paste0(prefix, "0"))
    extract_codes(node$right, paste0(prefix, "1"))
  }
  
  extract_codes(forest[[1]])
  return(codes)
}
```


```{r}
# --- ASSIGN NODE CODES (HUFFMAN PER MODULE) ---
node_codes <- rep("", n)

for (mod in 1:m) {
  nodes <- which(membership == mod)
  freqs <- visit_freq[nodes]
  
  # Avoid zero probabilities
  freqs[freqs == 0] <- min(freqs[freqs > 0]) * 0.5
  
  # Use custom Huffman
  huff <- huffman_code(nodes, freqs)
  
  # Store codes
  for (i in nodes) {
    node_codes[i] <- huff[[as.character(i)]]
  }
}

cat("\n===== NODE CODEBOOK =====\n")

node_table <- data.frame(
  node = 1:n,
  module = membership,
  code = node_codes,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Sort by module then node
node_table <- node_table[order(node_table$module, node_table$node), ]

print(node_table)

cat("\nTotal nodes:", n, "\n")
```

```{r}
# --- MODULE ENTRY & EXIT CODES (FIXED BY USER) ---
module_entry <- c(
  "111",    # A
  "0",      # B
  "10",     # C
  "110"     # D
)

module_exit <- c(
  "0001",   # A
  "1011",   # B
  "0001",   # C
  "000"     # D
)
```

```{r}
# --- VISUALIZATION ---
layout <- layout_with_fr(g, niter = 500)   # more spreading of nodes
cols <- c("red", "blue", "orange", "darkgreen")

# Allow drawing outside the plot area for nice legend placement
par(xpd = TRUE, mar = c(4, 4, 4, 10))

plot(
  g,
  layout = layout,
  vertex.color = cols[membership],
  vertex.size = 32,              # bigger nodes so labels fit
  vertex.label = node_codes,
  vertex.label.color = "white",  # high contrast
  vertex.label.cex = 0.8,        # smaller, fits inside
  vertex.label.font = 2,         # bold
  edge.arrow.size = 0,
  margin = 0.2,
  main = "Modular Network With Node Codes"
)

# Add legend to the far right, not overlapping
legend(
  "right",
  inset = c(-0.15, 0),
  legend = paste0("Module ", LETTERS[1:m],
                  "\n Entry = ", module_entry,
                  "\n Exit  = ", module_exit),
  col = cols,
  pch = 19,
  pt.cex = 1.7,
  bty = "n",
  cex = 0.9,
  text.col = cols
)
```

```{r}
# --- RANDOM WALK ENCODING FUNCTION ---
encode_walk <- function(path, membership, node_codes, module_entry, module_exit) {
  encoded <- c()
  
  prev_mod <- membership[path[1]]
  encoded <- c(encoded, module_entry[prev_mod], node_codes[path[1]])
  
  for (i in 2:length(path)) {
    mod_prev <- membership[path[i - 1]]
    mod_now  <- membership[path[i]]
    
    if (mod_prev != mod_now) {
      encoded <- c(encoded,
                   module_exit[mod_prev],
                   module_entry[mod_now])
    }
    
    encoded <- c(encoded, node_codes[path[i]])
  }
  
  paste(encoded, collapse = "")
}
```

```{r}
# --- GENERATE A NEW WALK AND ENCODE IT ---
walk_len <- 40
rw <- numeric(walk_len)
rw[1] <- sample(1:n, 1)

for (i in 2:walk_len) {
  if (runif(1) < teleport_prob) {
    rw[i] <- sample(1:n, 1)
  } else {
    ne <- neighbors(g, rw[i - 1])
    if (length(ne) == 0) rw[i] <- sample(1:n, 1)
    else rw[i] <- sample(ne, 1)
  }
}

encoded_walk <- encode_walk(rw, membership, node_codes, module_entry, module_exit)

cat("\nRandom walk node sequence:\n")
print(rw)
cat("\nEncoded walk:\n")
cat(encoded_walk, "\n")
cat("\nEncoded length:", nchar(encoded_walk), "bits\n")
```
